mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS name, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS img, COUNT(*) AS point FROM TBL_BOARD A JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID WHERE A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND A.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND A.PARENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND NVL(A.IS_SELECTED, 'N') = 'Y' GROUP BY U.USER_ID, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME), U.PROFILE_FILENAME ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, U.USER_ID ASC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS id, B.TITLE AS title, -- CONTENT가 CLOB일 가능성 방어 (DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR) DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.CONTENT, 120, 1) AS preview, NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS views, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD A WHERE A.PARENT_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND A.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' ) AS answers FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL ORDER BY NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) DESC, B.BOARD_ID DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND B.PARENT_ID IS NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD A WHERE A.PARENT_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND A.BOARD_TYPE = 'A' ) = 0
